pi_items.source: Task description amounts (2500 + 800) and verified via export_result.sh expectations
Task description amounts (55 + 120 + 450) and verified via export_result.sh expectations
Calculated (3300 - 625) from task description and verified via export_result.sh expectations
Calculated total income (3300 + 10000) and verified via export_result.sh grep logic
Calculated total expense (625 + 5000) and verified via export_result.sh grep logic
Calculated profit (13300 - 5625) and verified via export_result.sh grep logic

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating five financial tiddlers (2 Income, 3 Expense) and a dynamic Financial Dashboard. The expected baseline totals are 3300 (Income), 625 (Expense), and 2675 (Net Profit), derived directly from the explicit transaction amounts in the task description. The export_result.sh script verifies dynamic capability by synthetically injecting a test Income tiddler of 10000 and a test Expense tiddler of 5000. It then renders the dashboard to HTML and validates that the updated totals match 13300 (Income), 5625 (Expense), and 7675 (Net Profit). All metadata claims strictly align with these explicit descriptions and validation scripts.
